summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WhatsApp floating widget implementation on Sheeshmahal Jewellers website. All required features working perfectly across all pages.
passed_tests: WhatsApp widget visible on homepage (bottom-right corner)
WhatsApp widget visible on Gallery page
WhatsApp widget visible on About page
WhatsApp widget visible on Contact page
WhatsApp widget visible on Location page
Tooltip 'Chat with us!' shows correctly on hover
WhatsApp URL links to correct number (wa.me/919839555066)
Widget opens in new tab with proper target=_blank
Homepage hero section and navigation working
Contact form present with input fields and submit button
Location page with address and map elements
Hover animations and pulse effect working
Widget doesn't interfere with existing functionality
